turns.content: I bought a jacket from Acme Corp last week and it doesn't fit. Can I return it?

turns.reference: Yes, you can return the jacket. Acme Corp offers a 30-day return policy on all products. Since you bought it last week, you are within the return window. The jacket must be unused, in its original packaging, and you'll need the original receipt or proof of purchase.

turns.content: Great, how do I send it back? Do I have to pay for shipping?

turns.reference: Shipping costs for returns are the responsibility of the customer, unless the item was defective or the wrong item was shipped. Since the jacket doesn't fit (not a defect), you would need to cover the return shipping cost. Once Acme Corp receives the returned item, your refund will be processed within 5-7 business days.

turns.content: What if I just want to exchange it for a different size instead?

turns.reference: The knowledge base describes the return and refund process but does not provide specific details about size exchanges for non-electronic items. The general return policy requires items to be unused and in original packaging. I'd recommend contacting Acme Corp customer support for exchange options: phone at 1-800-ACME-HELP (Monday-Friday 8 AM-8 PM EST), email at support@acmecorp.com, or live chat (Monday-Saturday 9 AM-6 PM EST).

turns.content: I'm looking for a gift for someone who works from home. What do you recommend?

turns.reference: For someone who works from home, the Acme ErgoDesk Pro ($599.99) would be an excellent gift. It's a motorized standing desk with a 60x30 inch bamboo desktop, dual-motor height adjustment from 25.5 to 51 inches, 4 programmable height presets, and anti-collision technology. Another option is the Acme SmartHome Hub ($149.99) for home automation, or the Acme AirPure Pro ($299.99) air purifier to improve their workspace air quality.

turns.content: The ErgoDesk sounds great. Does it come with any warranty?

turns.reference: Yes, the ErgoDesk Pro comes with an excellent warranty. The frame and motors have a 5-year warranty, and the electronics and desktop surface have a 2-year warranty. This is significantly longer than the standard 1-year warranty on most Acme Corp products. The warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship under normal use. Extended warranty plans (2-year and 3-year) are also available at the time of purchase for additional coverage.

turns.content: It's a bit pricey. Can I split the payment?

turns.reference: Yes! Since the ErgoDesk Pro costs $599.99, which is over the $200 minimum, you qualify for Acme Pay Later. This splits your payment into 4 interest-free installments over 6 weeks. So you'd pay approximately $150 every 1.5 weeks. Acme Corp also accepts Visa, MasterCard, American Express, Discover, PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and Acme Gift Cards.

turns.content: I need to order a birthday gift and it needs to arrive by Friday. What are my shipping options?

turns.reference: For fast delivery, Acme Corp offers Expedited Shipping (2-3 business days, $12.99) and Overnight Shipping (next business day, $24.99). For overnight delivery, you need to place your order before 2 PM EST. Orders are processed within 1-2 business days. The best option depends on how many days until Friday — if it's tomorrow, Overnight Shipping ordered before 2 PM EST today would be your best bet.

turns.content: Actually, the gift is for my cousin in Germany. Can you ship there?

turns.reference: Yes, Acme Corp ships internationally to over 50 countries, which includes Germany. However, the timeline is longer: International Standard Shipping takes 10-21 business days, and International Express Shipping takes 5-7 business days. Unfortunately, neither option would guarantee Friday delivery if that's only a few days away. Also note that international orders may be subject to customs duties, taxes, and import fees, which would be your cousin's responsibility.

turns.content: Oh that won't work. If I order domestically, is standard shipping free?

turns.reference: Standard Shipping is free for orders over $50. It takes 5-7 business days though, so it might not arrive by Friday depending on when you order. If you need it by Friday, Expedited Shipping ($12.99, 2-3 business days) or Overnight Shipping ($24.99, next business day if ordered before 2 PM EST) would be more reliable options.

turns.content: My SmartHome Hub stopped connecting to my devices after 6 months. Is this covered under warranty?

turns.reference: The SmartHome Hub comes with a 2-year warranty, and since you've had it for only 6 months, you're well within the warranty period. The warranty covers defects in materials and workmanship under normal use. A connectivity failure after 6 months of normal use would likely qualify as a warranty claim. You'll need to provide proof of purchase and a description of the defect.

turns.content: How do I file the warranty claim?

turns.reference: To make a warranty claim, you need to provide proof of purchase and a description of the defect. Contact Acme Corp customer support through one of these channels: Phone at 1-800-ACME-HELP (1-800-226-3435), available Monday-Friday 8 AM-8 PM EST; email at support@acmecorp.com (24-48 hour response time); or live chat on the Acme website, Monday-Saturday 9 AM-6 PM EST.

turns.content: Since it's an electronic product, can I just exchange it instead?

turns.reference: Yes, since the SmartHome Hub is an electronic product and appears to be defective, you have the option to exchange it for the same model. Defective electronics can be exchanged within the first 90 days of purchase at no additional cost. However, since you've had it for 6 months (beyond 90 days), the direct exchange option may not apply. You would instead need to go through the warranty claim process for the remaining coverage under the 2-year warranty.

turns.content: Tell me about the Acme Rewards program. Is it worth joining?

turns.reference: The Acme Rewards program is free to join, so there's no cost to sign up. You earn 1 point per dollar spent, and 100 points equals $5 off your next purchase. All members get early access to sales, a 20% birthday discount, and free standard shipping on all orders. There are also Silver (500+ points/year) and Gold (1000+ points/year) tiers with additional perks.

turns.content: What do I get at the Silver and Gold tiers?

turns.reference: Silver tier (500+ points/year) unlocks free expedited shipping, which normally costs $12.99 per order. Gold tier (1000+ points/year) includes everything from Silver plus priority customer support and exclusive product previews. Both tiers are on top of the base benefits: free standard shipping, early access to sales, and the 20% birthday discount.

turns.content: I haven't bought anything in about 10 months. Will I lose my points?

turns.reference: Not yet, but you're getting close. Points expire after 12 months of account inactivity. Since it's been 10 months, you have approximately 2 months to make a purchase or otherwise engage with your account before your points expire. Any purchase would reset the inactivity clock and keep all your accumulated points active.

turns.content: If I buy the FitBand Ultra right now, would that keep my points and also earn me new ones?

turns.reference: Yes, purchasing the FitBand Ultra at $79.99 would reset your inactivity timer, preserving all your existing points. You would also earn approximately 79 new points from the purchase (1 point per dollar spent). Plus, as a Rewards member, you'd get free standard shipping on the order, saving you on shipping costs.
